1.text: The elder<S>4245</S> unto the wellbeloved<S>27</S> Gaius<S>1050</S>, whom<S>3739</S> I<S>1473</S> love<S>25</S> in<S>1722</S> the truth<S>225</S>. <sup>in: or, truly</sup>

Beloved<S>27</S>, I wish<S>2172</S> above<S>4012</S> all things<S>3956</S> that thou<S>4571</S> mayest prosper<S>2137</S> and<S>2532</S> be in health<S>5198</S>, even as<S>2531</S> thy<S>4675</S> soul<S>5590</S> prospereth<S>2137</S>. <sup>wish: or, pray</sup>

For<S>1063</S> I rejoiced<S>5463</S> greatly<S>3029</S>, when the brethren<S>80</S> came<S>2064</S> and<S>2532</S> testified<S>3140</S> of the truth<S>225</S> that is in thee<S>4675</S>, even as<S>2531</S> thou<S>4771</S> walkest<S>4043</S> in<S>1722</S> the truth<S>225</S>.
I have<S>2192</S> no<S>3756</S> greater<S>3186</S> <S>5130</S> joy<S>5479</S> than to<S>2443</S> hear<S>191</S> that my<S>1699</S> children<S>5043</S> walk<S>4043</S> in<S>1722</S> truth<S>225</S>.

Beloved<S>27</S>, thou doest<S>4160</S> faithfully<S>4103</S> whatsoever<S>3739</S> <S>1437</S> thou doest<S>2038</S> to<S>1519</S> the brethren<S>80</S>, and<S>2532</S> to<S>1519</S> strangers<S>3581</S>;

Which<S>3739</S> have borne witness<S>3140</S> of thy<S>4675</S> charity<S>26</S> before<S>1799</S> the church<S>1577</S>: whom<S>3739</S> if thou bring forward on their journey<S>4311</S> after<S>516</S> a godly<S>2316</S> sort<S>516</S>, thou shalt do<S>4160</S> well<S>2573</S>: <sup>after: Gr. worthy of God</sup>
Because that<S>1063</S> for<S>5228</S> his<S>846</S> name's<S>3686</S> sake<S>5228</S> they went forth<S>1831</S>, taking<S>2983</S> nothing<S>3367</S> of<S>575</S> the Gentiles<S>1484</S>.

We<S>2249</S> therefore<S>3767</S> ought<S>3784</S> to receive<S>618</S> such<S>5108</S>, that<S>2443</S> we might be<S>1096</S> fellowhelpers<S>4904</S> to the truth<S>225</S>. <sup>fellowhelpers: or, joint-labourers</sup>

I wrote<S>1125</S> unto the church<S>1577</S>: but<S>235</S> Diotrephes<S>1361</S>, who<S>3588</S> loveth to have the preeminence<S>5383</S> among them<S>846</S>, receiveth<S>1926</S> us<S>2248</S> not<S>3756</S>.

Wherefore<S>1223</S> <S>5124</S>, if<S>1437</S> I come<S>2064</S>, I will remember<S>5279</S> his<S>846</S> deeds<S>2041</S> which<S>3739</S> he doeth<S>4160</S>, prating against<S>5396</S> us<S>2248</S> with malicious<S>4190</S> words<S>3056</S>: and<S>2532</S> not<S>3361</S> content<S>714</S> therewith<S>1909</S> <S>5125</S>, neither<S>3777</S> doth<S>1926</S> he himself<S>846</S> receive<S>1926</S> the brethren<S>80</S>, and<S>2532</S> forbiddeth<S>2967</S> them that would<S>1014</S>, and<S>2532</S> casteth<S>1544</S> them out of<S>1537</S> the church<S>1577</S>.

Beloved<S>27</S>, follow<S>3401</S> not<S>3361</S> that which is evil<S>2556</S>, but<S>235</S> that which is good<S>18</S>. He that doeth good<S>15</S> is<S>2076</S> of<S>1537</S> God<S>2316</S>: but<S>1161</S> he that doeth evil<S>2554</S> hath<S>3708</S> not<S>3756</S> seen<S>3708</S> God<S>2316</S>.

Demetrius<S>1216</S> hath good report<S>3140</S> of<S>5259</S> all<S>3956</S> men, and<S>2532</S> of<S>5259</S> the truth<S>225</S> itself<S>846</S>: yea<S>1161</S>, and<S>2532</S> we<S>2249</S> also bear record<S>3140</S>; and<S>2532</S> ye know<S>1492</S> that<S>3754</S> our<S>2257</S> record<S>3141</S> is<S>2076</S> true<S>227</S>.

I had<S>2192</S> many things<S>4183</S> to write<S>1125</S>, but<S>235</S> I will<S>2309</S> not<S>3756</S> with<S>1223</S> ink<S>3188</S> and<S>2532</S> pen<S>2563</S> write<S>1125</S> unto thee<S>4671</S>:

But<S>1161</S> I trust<S>1679</S> I shall<S>1492</S> shortly<S>2112</S> see<S>1492</S> thee<S>4571</S>, and<S>2532</S> we shall speak<S>2980</S> face<S>4750</S> to<S>4314</S> face<S>4750</S>. Peace<S>1515</S> be to thee<S>4671</S>. Our friends<S>5384</S> salute<S>782</S> thee<S>4571</S>. Greet<S>782</S> the friends<S>5384</S> by<S>2596</S> name<S>3686</S>. <sup>face to: Gr. mouth to mouth</sup>
